tagline: The Zendesk Support connector allows you to ingest ticket data, help center content, and community forum data from Zendesk Support.
what_it_does: The Zendesk Support connector allows you to ingest ticket data, help center content, and community forum data from Zendesk Support.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
